question: Will Bad Bunny say "Fuck ICE" at the Big Game?
description:
Bad Bunny is scheduled to appear at the 2026 Super Bowl.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bad Bunny says "Fuck ICE" at any point during this event. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips or prerecorded videos are aired where Bad Bunny is speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

Commercials which are not part of the broadcast of the event itself will not qualify toward this market's resolution.

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

AI-generated audio or video will not qualify towards the resolution of this market.

In cases where a potential mention of the term is censored, a consensus of credible reporting will be used to determine whether it was stated.

If this appearance is definitively cancelled by Bad Bunny or NBC, or otherwise is not released by February 9, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be the official broadcast of Super Bowl LX.

question: Map Handicap: ARC (-1.5) vs ex-RUBY (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between ex-RUBY and ARCRED in the CCT Europe Series #13 Group Stage, scheduled for January 23 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ARCRED" if ARCRED wins 2 or more maps than ex-RUBY in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "ex-RUBY".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Map Handicap: TL (-1.5) vs Team Vitality (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Team Liquid and Team Vitality in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 23 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Liquid" if Team Liquid wins 2 or more maps than Team Vitality in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Team Vitality".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Nuggets and Bucks combine to score 216 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 216, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Map Handicap: ORUGA (-1.5) vs ShindeN (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between ShindeN and TEAM ORUGA in the CCT South America Series #7 Playoffs, scheduled for January 23 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "TEAM ORUGA" if TEAM ORUGA wins 2 or more maps than ShindeN in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "ShindeN".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Will Super Bowl LX have less than 116M viewers?
description:
This market will resolve according to the number of viewers (Persons 2+, average total viewers) Nielsen reports Super Bowl LX as having.

If this event is cancelled or otherwise does not occur by February 28, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

If the reported number of viewers falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source will be information from Nielsen, specifically their Persons 2+ statistic. A consensus of credible reporting on Nielsen's Persons 2+ statistic for Super Bowl LX may also be used. If Super Bowl LX takes place, and Nielsen does not provide viewership information for the broadcast of the game within 10 calendar days, another credible resolution for Super Bowl viewership source may be chosen.

If the reported number of viewers falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source will be information from Nielsen, specifically their Persons 2+ statistic. A consensus of credible reporting on Nielsen's Persons 2+ statistic for Super Bowl LX may also be used. If Super Bowl LX takes place, and Nielsen does not provide viewership information for the broadcast of the game within 10 calendar days, another credible resolution for Super Bowl viewership source may be chosen.

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 53.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between DRX and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 24 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all maps in this match is greater than or equal to 54.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: DRX vs FULL SENSE (BO3) - VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between DRX and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 24 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "DRX" if DRX win the match against FULL SENSE.

This market will resolve to "FULL SENSE" if FULL SENSE win the match against DRX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

question: Will the 2026 Big Game be the most viewed Big Game ever?
description:
Nielsen reported 127,713,000 viewers (Persons 2+, average total viewers) for Super Bowl LIX last year, making it the most viewed super bowl in history. 

This market will resolve to “Yes” if Nielsen reports more than 127,713,000 viewers (Persons 2+/P2+) for Super Bowl LX this year. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A reported number of viewers exactly equal to 127,713,000 will not qualify.

If Super Bowl LX is postponed after February 28, or otherwise not completed within this timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be information from Nielsen, specifically their Persons 2+ statistic. A consensus of credible reporting on Nielsen's Persons 2+ statistic for Super Bowl LX may also be used. If Super Bowl LX takes place, and Nielsen does not provide viewership information for the broadcast of the game within 10 calendar days, another credible source may be chosen.

description:

question: Australian Open Men's: Yu Jun Lin vs Mariia Makarova
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Yu Jun Lin and Mariia Makarova in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 23 at 7:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Lin' if Yu Jun Lin advances against Mariia Makarova.

This market will resolve to 'Makarova' if Mariia Makarova advances against Yu Jun Lin.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will no participants make a final pair?
description:
The finale of Single's Inferno: Season 5 is scheduled to release on Netflix on February 10, 2026. 

This market will resolve according to the number of participants who successfully make a final pair and leave the island with their chosen match by the end of the final episode of Single's Inferno: Season 5. 

If a person definitively fails to make a final pair, this participant will not count. Only the final pairs count; trips to Paradise will not qualify towards the resolution of this market. If the final episode of Single's Inferno: Season 5 does not air by February 28, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

The resolution source for this market will be the Netflix broadcast of the final episode of Single's Inferno: Season 5.

question: Series DRX Rounds Handicap (-2.5) vs FULL SENSE (+2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between DRX and FULL SENSE in the VCT Pacific Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 24 at 6:00AM ET.

If DRX defeats FULL SENSE by 3 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "DRX".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "FULL SENSE".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
